description: Focuses a date input field by its id, clears any existing text, types a date string, and then clicks a submit button.

evaluation.validation_summary: Ctx2Skill-lite preview verifier contract. External corpus parse/audit keeps this ephemeral until a human approves import.

implementation.prompt_template: Focus the input element with id <input_id>, clear it, type <date_value>, then click the element with id <submit_id>.

input_id.description: The id of the date input element.

submit_id.description: The id of the submit button.

postconditions: The input element is focused before typing.
The date_value is typed into the input.
preconditions: The input element with input_id exists.
The submit element with submit_id exists.

name: focus_and_fill_date_input_trajectory_rci_enter_date_submit

challenges.expected_evidence: The date input receives focus, the date appears in the input, and the submit action is triggered.
challenges.failure_signal: Focus not set, wrong date entered, or submit not clicked.
rubric: The date input id 'tt' is correctly focused.
The correct date string is typed.
The submit button id 'subbtn' is clicked.
challenges.task: Enter a different date (e.g., '12/25/2020') into the same input field and submit.

challenges.expected_evidence: No prior text remains, the new date is visible, and submit action occurs.
challenges.failure_signal: Prior text remains, new date is not entered, or submit fails.
rubric: Existing content is cleared before typing.
The new date is entered correctly.
challenges.task: If the input already contains text, clear it first, then enter a date and submit.

challenges.expected_evidence: Sequence of actions is preserved: focus, type, click.
challenges.failure_signal: Actions performed out of order, e.g., clicking submit before typing.
rubric: Focus is obtained on the date input.
Submit button is clicked in correct order.
challenges.task: Verify that the submit button click occurs only after the date input is focused and filled.

constraints: Focus must be inside the date input before typing.
examples: Entering '03/31/2015' into id 'tt' and clicking id 'subbtn'.
facts: The input must receive focus before typing.
procedures: Click on the date input element to focus it.
Type the date value into the input.
Click the submit button to complete the task.
context_pack.summary: A user needs to enter a date (03/31/2015) into a date input field with id 'tt' and then click a submit button with id 'subbtn'. The first step is to click the date input to focus it before typing.

ctx2skill_evidence.demo_scope: P0/P1 demo-paper implementation; not full long-horizon self-play training.

judge_results.rationale: Ctx2Skill-lite replay score meets the demo threshold.
Ctx2Skill-lite replay score meets the demo threshold.
Ctx2Skill-lite replay score meets the demo threshold.

Ctx2Skill-lite replay score meets the demo threshold.
Ctx2Skill-lite replay score meets the demo threshold.

ctx2skill_evidence.paper_method: Ctx2Skill-lite: challenger -> reasoner/judge -> proposer -> cross-time replay

selected_candidate.description: Focuses a date input field by its id, clears any existing text, types a date string, and then clicks a submit button.

input_id.description: The id of the date input element.

submit_id.description: The id of the submit button.

selected_candidate.name: focus_and_fill_date_input
postconditions: The input element is focused before typing.
The date_value is typed into the input.
preconditions: The input element with input_id exists.
The submit element with submit_id exists.
selected_candidate.prompt_template: Focus the input element with id <input_id>, clear it, type <date_value>, then click the element with id <submit_id>.

ctx2skill_evidence.selected_reason: The 'focus_and_fill_date_input' skill is more complete and directly addresses the entire task from the context (focus, type, submit). It has a higher score (0.85) because it encapsulates the reusable sequence for any date input form, while 'focus_element_by_id' is a sub-step only. The context clearly requires both focusing and submitting, so the combined skill is stronger for cross-time replay lite.
